info.title: Turerp ERP API
info.description:
Multi-tenant SaaS ERP system API

## Authentication

All endpoints except `/api/v1/auth/login`, `/api/v1/auth/register`, and `/api/v1/auth/refresh` require JWT Bearer token authentication.

## Rate Limiting

Authentication endpoints are rate limited to 10 requests per minute per IP address with a burst of 3 requests.

## Localization

All endpoints support per-request localization via the `Accept-Language` header. Supported languages: `en` (default), `tr`.

## API Versioning

- `/api/v1/` - Current stable API (recommended)
- `/api/auth/`, `/api/users/` - Legacy routes (deprecated, will be removed in v2)

tenant_id.description:
Tenant ID for the new user (required for registration)
SECURITY: Must be explicitly provided - no default tenant to prevent
accidental exposure of system tenant (id=1)
